nasb.text: It has often thrown him both into the fire and into the water to destroy him. But if You can do anything, take pity on us and help us!”

esv.text: And it has often cast him into fire and into water, to destroy him. But if you can do anything, have compassion on us and help us.”

cnv.text: 鬼常常把他扔在火裡水中，要毀滅他。如果你能作甚麼，求你可憐我們，幫助我們。”

ccb.text: 鬼常常将他扔进火里或水里，要害他的命。如果你能，求你怜悯我们，帮助我们吧！”

csbs.text: 邪灵经常把他扔进火里或水里，要害死他。但你如果能做什么，就求你怜悯我们，帮助我们！”
